paths.name: axios
paths.message: Do not use axios directly. Use the API client (apiGet/apiPost/apiPatch) from @/lib/api/client instead.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Do not call fetch() with a relative path. Use the API client (apiGet/apiPost/apiPatch) from @/lib/api/client instead.
